text.message: Not really. No ore, and low wood
But the best at 4th pick I think.  Let's try it
All three of your setups will be better than mine
the problem with that is you win the race
it's either race you or go brick port
red, i was saying black wins the race
i'm not worried about your pick :)
Im the king of 7ing out, dont worry
that's why i try to never end a turn over 5-6 cards
i mean 7-ing out implies you've got a lot in the orbit
also black was absolutely the right steal at the start. so much more potential than blue because they are the only one fighting road
hate that bug with trade reverse
bullying last because i pointed out they are gonna win
if you actually cared about how much ore people have why didn't you steal red?
dw, you'll get all 7s you need :)
blue doing pretty well for themselves
8 sheep and 6 sheep with sheep port
you wanted ore, probably should have done red
they are the ones about to city
feel like black is your only road competition and has way  more production
yeah, 5 wheat was the block for blue i feel like
its close between you and black though
yeah, you have 2 ports tho, 1 dev and 1 more settle
last in pts, first in potential
After 11-9-3 and road building it’s over
which is why i am confused you keep blocking 8 blue
Im sure ive 25 cards to 7ing out already
im not stealing black because on 8
But u insist on blocking and robbing me
With what brick and what wood
like you arent going to block me
you porting brick instead of taking road baffles
you are about to go to 8... and leading
your are not fooling anyone on your potential
and you are leaving yourself open to an upset
black whining all game like it would make a difference
just making the game no fun
no one's giving you a win either blue
settling on 4-92 gave you more chances
i had mono was hoping a 8 would roll and give me game
